questions: Is the intended hedge accounting model a hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation, or a hedge of the foreign currency exposure on a separate recognised receivable?
Should the intragroup dividend receivable be treated as part of the net investment in the foreign operation in the consolidated financial statements, or as an ordinary financial asset?

Are you asking only for approaches explicitly supported by the provided extracts, which mainly cover net investment hedges and general measurement/presentation of financial instruments, rather than the full set of IFRS 9 hedge accounting models?
